This move could also impact backward compatibility and digital sales, with some analysts suggesting that Sony may try to ease the transition by offering an add-on disc drive or disc-to-digital conversion program. The potential cost of such measures is likely to frustrate gamers further, particularly if they cannot find a way to bring their collections forward without incurring additional expenses.
